form.formComment: At debut, won won by a long-neck at this track March 29 over 1200m defeating Lady Godiva carrying 57kg at $11. Great effort on debut and is capable of keeping the ball rolling.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 2nd of 7 at Turffontein Standside on January 1 over 1000m, 4 len behind Custodian carrying 60kg at $6. Went for a spell before returning favourite; won by 1.75 len at Turffontein Standside March 21 over 1160m defeating Queen Leila with 57kg at $2.80. This is tougher so prefer others.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 4th in a small field at Turffontein Standside on March 21 over 1160m, 6 len behind Turn It Up carrying 60kg at $7.50. Previously second-up won by 1.0 len at Turffontein Standside December 7 over 800m defeating Spirit Of Gabz carrying 60kg at $1.80. Should progress from that first-up run.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 41-day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by a head at Scottsville March 1 over 1000m defeating Cherryblossompink with 60kg at $3. The start before that 2nd of 9 at Scottsville on February 8 over 1000m, 0.5 len behind Durban Diamond carrying 60kg at $2. Hard to have.

The race before that 3rd of 13 at Kenilworth on January 31 over 1100m, 1.4 len behind Red Spice carrying 59kg at $41. In the finish last time and should go well again.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 2.25 len at Turffontein Standside LR March 7 over 1000m defeating Griselda with 60kg at $3. The run before that favourite; won by 2 len at Vaal January 29 over 1000m defeating Staggerwing with 60kg at $2.40. Easy winner in Listed grade latest. This is well within her grasp.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months favourite; won by 2.5 len at Turffontein Standside March 21 over 1160m defeating Gone Cold with 60kg at $1.50. Previously second-up favourite; won by 5.5 len at Turffontein Standside December 30 over 1000m defeating Catfish carrying 60kg at $1.70. Hard to fault on current form. Promising colt who was too good fresh and is expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Resuming after a ten weeks break. Finished off last preparation second last of 13 at Kenilworth January 31 over 1100m, 9 len behind Red Spice carrying 57.5kg at $3.30. On debut third of 10 at Kenilworth November 22 over 800m, 2 len behind Querari Dancer with 57.5kg at $2.70. Certainly one to consider.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced prominently and tired quickly in the straight.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 42 day let-up. At the latest run won by a long-neck at Kenilworth G3 February 28 over 1200m defeating Roskilde with 60kg at $5.50. The race before that won by a long-neck at Kenilworth January 31 over 1100m defeating St Harry carrying 59kg at $17. In great form winning last two, the latest a Grade 3 at this trio. Winning hope again.

form.formComment: Yet to taste defeat in two starts. When well in the market on debut, favourite; won by 7 len at Turffontein Standside February 7 over 1000m defeating Nightshine carrying 60kg at $1.80. Last start favourite; won by 1.75 len at Turffontein Standside LR March 7 over 1000m defeating Gimme A Vodka carrying 60kg at $1.30. Unbeaten colt who won by a space on debut then won in Listed grade last time. Can make it three straight.

form.formComment: At the latest run 3rd in a small field at this track on March 29 over 1200m, 3 len behind Erik Dubois carrying 57.5kg at $3. The run before that won by a neck at Kenilworth February 22 over 1200m defeating Vibe Check carrying 57.5kg at $13.50. Racing okay but look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Most recently 2nd of 11 at this track on March 27 over 1000m, nose behind Flower Tryst with 60kg at $1.90. The race before that 3rd of 9 at Kenilworth in G3 on February 28 over 1200m, 0.9 len behind Red Spice carrying 56.5kg at $13.50. Still a maiden but shows good promise and stakes placed this trip. Don't underestimate.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lost 1 length and thereafter slow into stride. Raced green.
Shortly after the start, took an awkward stride.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, 10th of 16 at Scottsville on February 18 over 1100m, 7 len behind Lady Godiva carrying 60kg at $11. Second-up 4th of 11 at this track on March 27 over 1000m, 2 len behind Flower Tryst with 60kg at $34. Unlikely to finish in the winner's circle.
